title: Build a Game That Fits on a Single Floppy Disk: The 1.44MB Game Development Contest Opens
excerpt: New competition to see if you can make a game that fits on a floppy (disk).
content_html:
1. Home
  2. Press releases
  3. Build a Game That Fits on a Single Floppy Disk: The 1.44MB Game Development Contest Opens

Press release

13/07/2026

Game Development Contest
 

  • 2P GAME ARCADE Accepting Entries Through September 4; KRW 1.14 Million in Total Prizes
  • “Fit Your Game into 1.44MB”: Floppy Disk Game Development Contest Opens
  • Compete with the Capacity of a Single Floppy Disk: Entries Open for the 1.44MB Game Development Contest
  • KRW 1.14 Million in Prizes: The 1.44MB Game Contest Turns an Extreme Size Limit into a Creative Experiment
  • “Gameplay Over Graphics”: Game Contest Challenges Developers to Finish within 1.44MB
  • The 3.5-Inch Floppy Returns: Tiny 1.44MB Game Development Contest Accepting Entries Through September 4
  • Constraint Fuels Creativity: 2P GAME ARCADE Launches the 1.44MB Game Development Contest

A game development contest is inviting creators to build complete games within 1.44MB—the capacity of a single floppy disk. At a time when high-end graphics and massive content have become the norm, the contest reintroduces an extreme file-size limit as a creative condition.

Game culture project group 2P GAME ARCADE announced that it is accepting entries for the 1.44MB Game Development Contest through September 4, in collaboration with Minimap, IndieGame.com, Chungkang College of Cultural Industries, and Myongji College. The contest offers KRW 1.14 million in total prizes: KRW 720,000 for first place, KRW 280,000 for second, and KRW 140,000 for third.

The contest’s defining feature is its 1.44MB limit, once the standard storage capacity of a 3.5-inch floppy disk. Organizers said the rule was designed to explore how effectively developers can realize their technical skill and ideas within a severely limited amount of space.

All files required to run each game must fit within 1.44MB. Entries must be standalone games that run without a separate server or internet connection, and the size limit includes every required component, including game engines and libraries. HTML- or web-based games that depend on a web browser or the installation of an external runtime are not eligible. However, there are no restrictions on development technology: entrants may use C++, HSP, other programming languages, custom-built tools, or lightweight game engines. Games do not need to be submitted on a physical floppy disk.

Both individuals and teams may enter, and contestants may use existing game engines or tools they have developed themselves. Entrants must hold the appropriate rights to all programs, images, audio, and other materials included in their submissions.

With indie game platforms and game education institutions participating as partners, the organizers expect a wide range of submissions from working indie developers, students studying game development, and emerging creators. Winning games are scheduled to be featured at future 2P GAME ARCADE events and through its online channels.

A representative of 2P GAME ARCADE, which organized the contest, said, “This is not simply an event that recreates an old storage medium. It is an experiment in how extreme constraints can change developers’ creativity and approaches to problem-solving.”

The representative added, “We hope participants will go beyond merely cutting graphics and sound to reach 1.44MB, and instead reconsider what makes a game fundamentally fun. We look forward to original challenges from professional and indie developers, students studying game development, and many other creators.”

Applications and submissions are accepted through the contest’s official website, 2PGARCADE.COM. Inquiries may be sent to onlia1214@2pgarcade.com or mecagun@2pgarcade.com.

Contest Overview
▪ Contest: 1.44MB Game Development Contest
▪ Submission deadline: September 4, 2026
▪ Eligibility: Individuals or teams interested in game development
▪ Size limit: Complete distribution package must not exceed 1.44MB
▪ Runtime requirement: Must run independently without internet access, a server, or a web browser
▪ Prizes: KRW 1.14 million total (1st: KRW 720,000; 2nd: KRW 280,000; 3rd: KRW 140,000)
▪ Organizer: 2P GAME ARCADE
▪ Partners: Minimap, IndieGame.com, Chungkang College of Cultural Industries, Myongji College
▪ Entry and inquiries: 2PGARCADE.COM / onlia1214@2pgarcade.com, mecagun@2pgarcade.co

content_html_zh:
1. Home
  2. 新闻稿
  3. 构建适合一张软盘的游戏：1.44MB 游戏开发大赛开幕

新闻稿

13/07/2026

游戏开发大赛

  • 2P GAME ARCADE 9 月 4 日之前接受报名；总奖金114万韩元
  • “将你的游戏装入1.44MB”：软盘游戏开发大赛开幕
  • 比拼单张软盘容量：1.44MB游戏开发大赛开放参赛
  • 奖金114万韩元：1.44MB游戏大赛将极限尺寸变成创意实验
  • “游戏性优于图形”：游戏竞赛挑战开发者在 1.44MB 内完成
  • 3.5 英寸软盘回归：小型 1.44MB 游戏开发竞赛截至 9 月 4 日接受参赛
  • 约束激发创造力：2P GAME ARCADE推出1.44MB游戏开发大赛

一场游戏开发竞赛邀请创作者在 1.44MB（一张软盘的容量）内构建完整的游戏。 在高端图形和海量内容已成为常态的时代，竞赛重新引入了极端的文件大小限制作为创意条件。

游戏文化项目组 2P GAME ARCADE 宣布，将与 Minimap、IndieGame.com、Chungkang 文化产业学院和 Myongji 学院合作，在 9 月 4 日之前接受 1.44MB 游戏开发竞赛的参赛作品。 比赛总奖金为114万韩元：第一名72万韩元，第二名28万韩元，第三名14万韩元。

该竞赛的决定性特点是 1.44MB 的限制，曾经是 3.5 英寸软盘的标准存储容量。 组织者表示，该规则旨在探索开发人员如何在严格有限的空间内有效地实现他们的技术技能和想法。

运行每个游戏所需的所有文件必须在 1.44MB 以内。 参赛作品必须是无需单独服务器或互联网连接即可运行的独立游戏，并且大小限制包括所有必需的组件，包括游戏引擎和库。 依赖于网络浏览器或安装外部运行时的 HTML 或网络游戏不符合资格。 然而，开发技术没有限制：参赛者可以使用C++、HSP、其他编程语言、定制工具或轻量级游戏引擎。 游戏不需要通过物理软盘提交。

个人和团队都可以参赛，参赛者可以使用现有的游戏引擎或自己开发的工具。 参赛者必须对其提交的内容中包含的所有程序、图像、音频和其他材料拥有适当的权利。

独立游戏平台和游戏教育机构作为合作伙伴参与其中，组织者期待来自独立开发者、学习游戏开发的学生和新兴创作者的广泛提交。 获胜游戏计划在未来的 2P GAME ARCADE 活动中并通过其在线渠道进行展示。

主办本次比赛的2P GAME ARCADE的代表表示：“这不仅仅是一场重新制作旧存储介质的活动。 这是一项关于极端约束如何改变开发人员的创造力和解决问题的方法的实验。”

该代表补充道：“我们希望参与者不仅仅将图形和声音削减到 1.44MB，而是重新考虑是什么让游戏从根本上变得有趣。 我们期待来自专业和独立开发者、学习游戏开发的学生以及许多其他创作者的原创挑战。”

通过比赛的官方网站 2PGARCADE.COM 接受申请和提交。 如有疑问，请发送至 onlia1214@2pgarcade.com 或 mecagun@2pgarcade.com。

竞赛概述 ▪ 竞赛：1.44MB 游戏开发竞赛 ▪ 提交截止日期：2026 年 9 月 4 日 ▪ 资格：对游戏开发感兴趣的个人或团队 ▪ 大小限制：完整分发包不得超过 1.44MB ▪ 运行时间要求：必须在没有互联网连接、服务器或网络浏览器的情况下独立运行 ▪ 奖品：总计 114 万韩元（第一名：72 万韩元；第二名： 280,000 韩元；第三名：140,000 韩元） ▪ 主办方：2P GAME ARCADE ▪ 合作伙伴：Minimap、IndieGame.com、中央文化产业专门学校、明知学院 ▪ 报名及咨询：2PGARCADE.COM / onlia1214@2pgarcade.com、mecagun@2pgarcade.co
